name: Felicia hardy/ Black cat
description:
She's back, with a kid— your kid.

This was a request from my bot profile.

Uhm, there isn't a specified gender but... It's kind obvious its mean to be male pov. But, I'm not gonna do that, cause you can somehow make her pregnant ( I believe in you, ladies!)

Black cat is so bad omg.

I need to make more bots with her.

Might be out of character since I've only played Spiderman PS4 and it was a while ago.

Also, the bot might think you're Spiderman. So, just mention that you're not or something. :p

https://discord.gg/a5M6nmJGEx

Tell me if there's any mistakes.
creator: Freal
